title: Flower Expansion [Cobblemon]
description: An addon for the Cobblemon mod adding more vartaints of various floral Pokémon!
body:
## This addon requires the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod to work.

Discover new forms of the Single Bloom Pokémon, Flabébé, the Posy Picker Pokémon, Comfey, and many more!

This pack currently adds new variants to 5 evolutionary lines of Pokémon, all being able to spawn without any additional mods! (however, there will be additional biome mod support!)

These forms, like all of Flabébé's forms, are just cosmetic and do not affect their stats or abilities.

Additionally, icons from the [E19 Xaero's Minimap resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons) have support for this addon!

## Currently avaible forms and how to obtain them
<details>
<summary>Flabébé Line</summary>

Flabébé colours spawn only near flowers of the same colour, like the standard Cobblemon Flabébé. Here's a list of what colour spawns near what flowers:
  
- Purple:
   - Vanilla: Allium, Lilac
   - [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty): Lavender, Tall Lavender, Violet, Wildflower
   - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit): Lavender, Foxglove, Purple Wildflower, Black Iris, Anemone, Purple Heather
   - [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild): Phlox, Purple Hibiscus, Carnation, Pasqueflower
   - [Trailier Tales](https://modrinth.com/mod/trailier-tales): Manedrop
- Green:
   - Vanilla: Mangrove Propagule (yes, that's a flower)
- Black:
   - Vanilla: Wither Rose
- Cyan:
   - Vanilla: Blue Orchid, Pitcher Plant
   - [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty): Blue Hydrangea, Icy Iris
   - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit): Blue Iris
   - [Trailier Tales](https://modrinth.com/mod/trailier-tales): Cyan Rose
- Brown: 
   - Vanilla: Cocoa (plant, not seeds)

To spawn a new Flabébé variant, use the command ``/pokespawn [species] flower-expansion=[colour]``

Additionally, as a form of compatibility, standard Cobblemon colours spawn near the following flowers:
- Red:
   - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit): Carnation, Red Heather, Hibiscus, Ruby Blossoms
   - [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild): Red Hibiscus
- Orange:
   - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit): Begonia, Marigold, Tiger Lily
   - [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild): Marigold, Lantanas
- Yellow: 
   - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit):  Marigold, Yellow Wildflower
   - [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild): Yellow Hibiscus, Wildflowers
- Blue:
  - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit): Blue Bulbs, Bluebell, Blue Iris
  - [Trailier Tales](https://modrinth.com/mod/trailier-tales): Cyan Rose
- White:
  - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit): Gardenia, White Heather
  - [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild): White Hibiscus, Wildflowers
- Pink:
  - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit): Bleeding Heart, Snapdragon, Dwarf Blossoms, Protea, Lotus Flower (and stem)
   - [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild): Pink Hibiscus

![A Flabébé holding a cyan flower, flying forwards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34b30e77796c6f8f2530e19815dac29dd3498fe6.png)![A Floette holding a black flower looking up on the text above it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f98e522edf9cfac5a4db2773187708baee6d8b09.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Comfey</summary>

All of Comfey's spawns are the same as the Flabébé line. The original Flabébé colours use "#cobblemon:[colour]_flowers", and the custom added colours are the same as the ones I gave Flabébé. There is no cyan or brown variant. There's around a 50/50 chance of getting the normal Comfey or one with a certain colour of flowers.

To spawn a Comfey with coloured flowers, use the command ``/pokespawn comfey comfey-flower=[colour]``

There's also a little easter egg!

![A Comfey holding yellow flowers looking at the viewer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c64fb0cb6b35b5f5fef721f71917c6413e64acd.png)![A Comfey holding blue flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68df46e89d62482fae8005b33a0118dc3fa92e6c.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Sunflora</summary>

Sunflora's variants are random! Each Sunflora will have a randomly chosen variant from the pool. The new variants are: Classic, Leucistic, and Blazing. Sunkern also have those variants, but don't change visually.

To spawn a certain Sunflora, use the command ``/pokespawn sunflora sunflora-variant=[variant]``

![A "Blazing" Sunflora, a Sunflora with red petals, laughing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86200612ce3e3a2e57e86f8e97b2c5dcaadd9208.png)![A "Classic" Sunflora, a Sunflora with a brown face, sleeping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27395cc19745870f8d193d8773b97b7c6d973f45.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Meganium</summary>
Meganium's flower depends on the flower held by Bayleef before evolving, similar to Cobblemon's Torterra. It accepts all vanilla Minecraft flowers! Here's how to get each variant:
  
- Red - give Bayleef a poppy, red tulip, or a rose bush
- Orange - give Bayleef an orange tulip, or a torchflower
- Yellow -  give Bayleef a dandelion, or a sunflower
- Green -  give Bayleef a mangrove propagule
- Cyan - give Bayleef a blue orchid, or pitcher plant
- Blue - give Bayleef a cornflower
- Purple - give Bayleef an allium, or a lilac bush
- Pink - give Bayleef a pink tulip, spore blossom, peony, pink petals, or cherry leaves
- White - give Bayleef a white tulip, azure bluet, oxeye daisy, or a lily of the valley
- Black - give Bayleef a whiter rose

To spawn a certain Meganium, use the command ``/pokespawn meganium meganium-flower=[variant]``

![A Meganium with a blue flower on its neck instead of the typical red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/428c2a7cd4691a346a0fa9f42a8044336e405798.png)![A Meganium with a pink flower on its neck instead of the typical red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0111ea64d3ffe50eb86f1846282173557e2c14c.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Roselia Line</summary>
Roselia's roses can be any of 4 colours: red, blue, yellow, and white. Each rose has a randomly assigned colour, making for a total of 16 variants! Additionally, Roserade's eyes change colour depending on the rose's colour.

The shiny variant has purple, green, orange, and black roses instead.

To spawn one with a certain rose combination, use the command ``/pokespawn [species] roselia-rose=[variant]``

![A Roserade with a white right bouquet and a blue right bouquet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00b24d59ae1fb3581ba144f8c2260872f499254c.png)![A Budew with its bud open, showing white and yellow petals inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1fe166043c108289b5b1987144950d54e8077db.png)

</details>

## Installation

<center>To install this addon, make sure the downloaded file is placed in your world's datapack folder, and in your Minecraft instance resourcepacks folder. Remember to enable the resourcepack in the in-game menu!</center>

#

<center>I hope you enjoy!

![A Floette holding a purple flower, smiling towards the camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97fa1c5892157b48c428de9ec7880e4963444995.png)</center>

#

<center>This addon was made for the 1.7 version of Cobblemon, it might not work in older versions. I do not plan backporting it. This might not work with other addons editing the same Pokémon as this pack.</center>

#
<details>
<summary>Guidelines</summary>  

Here are some guidelines as to what you can and can't do with this pack

You may:
  - Use this pack for a private server or modpack for you and your friends
  - Use this pack on a public server or modpack WITH my permission. You must include proof that my pack is allowed to be used. You can contact me via the "report issues" link
  - Edit this pack for private use only



You may not:
  - Use this pack on public modpacks/servers without my permission
  - Paywall any content of this pack. This includes locking the variants behind crates/other methods you can use real money on to obtain
  - Release modified versions of this pack for public use
  - Redistribute the pack on websites other than Modrinth


</details>
